items.title: Iran War Live Updates: U.S. and Iran Trade Proposals on Nuclear Restrictions
items.summary: Iran said it could suspend uranium enrichment for up to five years but the Trump administration insisted on 20 years, officials from both countries said.
items.whyItMatters: It adds one useful signal to the current news mix without turning XLB into an overwhelming news feed.

items.title: Two students die, one critical after drug consumption at Mumbai concert, 5 held
items.summary: Police yet to disclose names of deceased or accused, say organisers failed to take precautions

items.title: UK faces biggest hit to growth from Iran war of major economies, IMF says
items.summary: The financial body cuts its growth forecast for the UK and warns the war threatens to throw the global economy "off course".
